brand.name: Flame
brand.tagline: The power you always had, but never knew.

mission.headline: A threshold. Not a brochure.
body: Flame exists to reveal the authority already living inside you—and train it into action.
Not noise. Not motivation. Not performance.

pillars.title: Quiet Power
pillars.text: No begging for attention. Presence speaks first.

pillars.title: Precision
pillars.text: Every word earns its place. Every step has intent.

pillars.title: Protector + Builder
pillars.text: Guard what matters. Build what’s missing.

impact.headline: Measured in ripples, not applause.
body: Flame’s impact shows up as people who stop fragmenting themselves.
Creators who trade confusion for conviction.
Leaders who choose integrity over approval—then move.

signals.title: Culture gets protected
signals.text: What’s sacred is not up for sale.

books.title: Flame: The Threshold
books.description: A short book on reclaiming internal authority and moving with consequence.

books.title: Quiet Power Playbook
books.description: Practical frameworks for clarity, discipline, and creative execution.

workshops.title: Enter Flame (90 minutes)
workshops.description: A live session to cut through fog, name what matters, and choose your next move.

workshops.title: Precision Week
workshops.description: A focused sprint to align your work, your schedule, and your standards.

videos.title: The Power You Always Had
videos.description: A short transmission to set the tone.

videos.title: Quiet Power: What It Actually Means
